description:
Spec: CLAUDE.md — "Tests must pass." Closing the fz-siu.1 cutover requires the full suite to be green after intermediate deferred-checks period.

Work:
- Run `cargo test --workspace` and fix all failures introduced during the .1.7-.1.11 chain.
- Run `cargo build --workspace --release` and fix all warnings (CLAUDE.md: warnings are errors).
- Re-enable any `#[ignore]`'d acceptance tests in tests/fixture_matrix.rs not already re-enabled by .1.9 / .1.11.
- Add disassembly-equality tests for §8.2 and §8.3 target clif (parallel to §8.1's `tail_recursion_count_matches_cps_in_clif_section_8_1`).
- Update memory: remove or supersede `project_fz_siu_deferred_checks` (regime ends here).
- Confirm sanity fixtures still pass: add1, tail_recursion, vr3_float_args, higher_order, closure_typed_captures, concurrency_ping_pong.

Acceptance:
- Zero failing tests across workspace.
- Zero warnings in release build.
- All four §8.x target clif acceptance tests GREEN.
- Memory file `project_fz_siu_deferred_checks.md` removed.
title: fz-cps.1.12: re-bless full suite; close deferred-checks regime
